title: Nestle India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Nestle India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Nestle India has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Gwalior office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Nestle India:
Nestle India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nestle India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
